---
title: "Presentations"
---

Upcoming: I will be presenting in Nordstat 2023 on the 19th of June, 2023.

Past: The list is not complete but I am happy to have presented at the following events

-   Bayescomp 2023. Poster.

-   German Probability Days and Statistics. Contributed session.

-   ICSDS 2022, Florence, Italy 2022. Best paper award given by the IMS.

-   SimTech Status Seminar, Bad Boll, Germany 2022

-
